title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
